gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Sequence encoding: `bundle( permute^0(items[0]), permute^1(items[1]), ‚Ä¶ )`."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Each item `i` is permuted by shift `i` to protect its position (a positional encoding),"] # [doc = " then the permuted items are bundled.  The guarantee tag is the meet of `bundle`'s tag"] # [doc = " (model-dependent) and `permute`'s tag (`Exact`), which is just the `bundle` tag ‚Äî see"] # [doc = " `vsa.md ¬ß4` row `encode_seq`."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " An empty slice is `Err(EmptyBundle)` ‚Äî the bundle of zero items is undefined (C1 / G2)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::EmptyBundle`] ‚Äî zero items supplied."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::NestedBundleUnsupported`] ‚Äî a MAP-B input is itself a bundle (RR-13)."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::DimMismatch`] ‚Äî items have differing lengths."] pub fn encode_seq < M : VsaModel > (model : & M , items : & [& [f64]]) -> Result < Vec < f64 > , VsaError > { if items . is_empty () { return Err (VsaError :: EmptyBundle) ; } let permuted : Vec < Vec < f64 > > = items . iter () . enumerate () . map (| (i , item) | model . permute (item , i as i64)) . collect :: < Result < _ , _ > > () ? ; let refs : Vec < & [f64] > = permuted . iter () . map (Vec :: as_slice) . collect () ; model . bundle (& refs) }
gaps.reason: type parameter `M` carries a bound ‚Äî type_params/fn generics are bare identifiers only in this grammar fragment

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Set encoding: `bundle(items[0], items[1], ‚Ä¶)` ‚Äî superpose atoms without positional encoding."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The guarantee tag equals the model's `bundle` tag (the permute identity is `Exact` and"] # [doc = " contributes nothing to the meet).  Useful for set/bag membership probes where order does not"] # [doc = " matter."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " An empty slice is `Err(EmptyBundle)` (C1 / G2)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::EmptyBundle`] ‚Äî zero items supplied."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::NestedBundleUnsupported`] ‚Äî MAP-B nesting (RR-13)."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::DimMismatch`] ‚Äî items have differing lengths."] # [inline] pub fn encode_set < M : VsaModel > (model : & M , items : & [& [f64]]) -> Result < Vec < f64 > , VsaError > { if items . is_empty () { return Err (VsaError :: EmptyBundle) ; } model . bundle (items) }

Same guarantee as"] # [doc = " `bind` for the model (see [`bind`] for the guarantee-tag breakdown)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " See [`bind`]."] # [inline] pub fn bind_role < M : VsaModel > (model : & M , role : & [f64] , filler : & [f64] ,) -> Result < Vec < f64 > , VsaError > { bind (model , role , filler) }
gaps.reason: type parameter `M` carries a bound ‚Äî type_params/fn generics are bare identifiers only in this grammar fragment

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Cleanup: nearest-atom indexed retrieval against an item memory."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " `Empirical` (bounded-lossy item memory, Clarkson Thm 16; M-132).  Returns"] # [doc = " `Match { label, index, confidence, margin }` so the caller can inspect and threshold the"] # [doc = " result ‚Äî never a silent low-confidence guess (C1/C3 / G2 / FR-C2)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Explicit refusals (C1 / G2):"] # [doc = " - `Err(BelowCleanupThreshold)` when `confidence < min_confidence` (the caller-supplied floor)."] # [doc = " - `Err(BelowCleanupThreshold)` when `margin < min_margin` (near-tied slots). See the FLAG in"] # [doc = "   the body: `mycelium-vsa::VsaError` has **no** distinct `Ambiguous` variant, so the"] # [doc = "   margin-shortfall case is surfaced through `BelowCleanupThreshold` (with `confidence` carrying"] # [doc = "   the margin and `threshold` carrying `min_margin`) ‚Äî never a silent guess. A dedicated variant"] # [doc = "   is a kernel change (FLAG)."] # [doc = " - `Err(EmptyCodebook)` when the memory is empty or the query has the wrong length."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Setting `min_confidence = 0.0` and `min_margin = 0.0` disables the threshold gates,"] # [doc = " returning the raw nearest-neighbour hit (the confidence/margin are still reported in"] # [doc = " `Match` for the caller to inspect)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::EmptyCodebook`] ‚Äî the memory is empty or query length disagrees with `dim`."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::BelowCleanupThreshold`] ‚Äî `confidence < min_confidence`, **or** the"] # [doc = "   margin-shortfall case `margin < min_margin` (see the body FLAG: `VsaError` has no"] # [doc = "   `Ambiguous` variant, so both refusals share this variant)."] pub fn cleanup < M : VsaModel > (codebook : & CleanupMemory , query : & [f64] , model : & M , min_confidence : f64 , min_margin : f64 ,) -> Result < Match , VsaError > { let hit = codebook . cleanup (query , model) . ok_or (VsaError :: EmptyCodebook) ? ; if hit . confidence < min_confidence { return Err (VsaError :: BelowCleanupThreshold { confidence : hit . confidence , threshold : min_confidence , }) ; } if hit . margin < min_margin { return Err (VsaError :: BelowCleanupThreshold { confidence : hit . margin , threshold : min_margin , }) ; } Ok (hit) }
gaps.reason: type parameter `M` carries a bound ‚Äî type_params/fn generics are bare identifiers only in this grammar fragment

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Compositional reconstruction: unbind `record` by a named `role`, then clean up against"] # [doc = " `memory`."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Requires:"] # [doc = " - A `CompositionalReconstruction` manifest (`Err(NotCompositional)` otherwise)."] # [doc = " - The manifest's recipe to name `role` (`Err(UnknownRole)` otherwise)."] # [doc = " - A `Cleanup` decode procedure with a threshold (`Err(NotCompositional)` otherwise)."] # [doc = " - The cleanup confidence to meet the manifest's threshold (`Err(BelowCleanupThreshold)`)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Returns [`Match`] `{ label, index, confidence, margin }` ‚Äî the recovered filler atom with its"] # [doc = " confidence/margin so the caller can inspect and judge the quality (C3 / G2 / FR-C2)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The guarantee tag is the meet of the model's `unbind` tag and `cleanup`'s `Empirical` tag"] # [doc = " (weakest-wins; RFC-0001 ¬ß4.7) ‚Äî at most `Empirical`, never `Proven`."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::NotThisModel`] ‚Äî `record` or `role_atom` is not of the manifest's model."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::NotCompositional`] ‚Äî the manifest does not support compositional reconstruction."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::UnknownRole`] ‚Äî `role` is not in the manifest's recipe."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::EmptyCodebook`] ‚Äî `memory` is empty or has the wrong dim."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::BelowCleanupThreshold`] ‚Äî cleanup confidence is below the manifest threshold."] pub fn reconstruct_role < M : VsaModel > (model : & M , manifest : & ReconInfo , record : & Value , role : & str , role_atom : & Value , memory : & CleanupMemory ,) -> Result < Match , VsaError > { mycelium_vsa :: recon :: reconstruct_role (model , manifest , record , role , role_atom , memory) }
gaps.reason: type parameter `M` carries a bound ‚Äî type_params/fn generics are bare identifiers only in this grammar fragment

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Resonator factorization: recover the unknown factor atoms of a bind product."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Opt-in, **probabilistic-only** (`Empirical` ceiling for MAP-I/BSC ‚Äî never `Proven`; FR-C2)."] # [doc = " For a `Resonator` manifest, reads the iteration budget and decode params, gates on the"] # [doc = " trial-validated [`MAPI_RESONATOR_PROFILE`](mycelium_vsa::MAPI_RESONATOR_PROFILE), and runs"] # [doc = " the resonator loop."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Returns [`Factorization`] **only** on a clean `Converged` verdict clearing every per-slot"] # [doc = " confidence/margin threshold.  All non-convergence outcomes are explicit errors carrying the"] # [doc = " inspectable [`ResonatorTrace`](mycelium_vsa::ResonatorTrace) (C3 / G2 / RFC-0009 ¬ß5/¬ß6):"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorBudgetExhausted`]"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorOscillating`]"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorStalled`]"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorBelowConfidence`]"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorBelowMargin`]"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # FLAG Q4 ‚Äî `Declared` coverage deferred"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " RFC-0009 ¬ß9 Q6 caps resonator factorization at `Empirical` for exact-bind models (MAP-I/BSC)"] # [doc = " and `Declared` for sparse/HRR/FHRR.  This function gates on the MAP-I profile and is the"] # [doc = " validated path; the `Declared` paths for sparse/HRR/FHRR are deferred to RFC-0009 ¬ß10.3"] # [doc = " (deferred coverage) and not yet exported in `std.vsa` v0 (vsa.md ¬ß7-Q4)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::NotThisModel`] ‚Äî `record` is not of the manifest's model."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::NotCompositional`] ‚Äî the manifest is not a `Resonator` decode."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::OutsideEmpiricalProfile`] ‚Äî the request exceeds the validated regime."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorBudgetExhausted`] ‚Äî budget reached without convergence."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorOscillating`] ‚Äî a genuine period-‚â•2 limit cycle."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorStalled`] ‚Äî stationary tuple plateaued below `œÑ_lock`."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorBelowConfidence`] ‚Äî a slot's confidence is below the threshold."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorBelowMargin`] ‚Äî a slot's margin is below the threshold."] pub fn reconstruct_factors < M : VsaModel > (model : & M , manifest : & ReconInfo , record : & Value , codebooks : & [CleanupMemory] ,) -> Result < Factorization , VsaError > { mycelium_vsa :: recon :: reconstruct_factors (model , manifest , record , codebooks) }
gaps.reason: type parameter `M` carries a bound ‚Äî type_params/fn generics are bare identifiers only in this grammar fragment
